description: Dual-lane still upscale: FAST ESRGAN-family (style models) + HERO SeedVR2. Community best-of 2025–2026 for local ComfyUI.
research_basis: Comfy Org Upscaling Handbook (2026-02): SeedVR2 conservative quality; gradual 1080→4K
r/comfyui / r/StableDiffusion: SeedVR2 preferred over SUPIR for speed/reliability; SUPIR still strong for creative restore
Factory inventory: F:\model\upscale_models + F:\model\SEEDVR2 via extra_model_paths

fast_cnn.when: preview, batch, clean sources, anime line fidelity

hero_seedvr2.when: hero keyframes, blurry AI stills, archival restore

not_included: SUPIR (heavy SDXL restore — optional later; SeedVR2 preferred default hero)
Ultimate SD Upscale (needs matching diffusion checkpoint; use Illustrious pack --ultimate-upscale for anime XL)
Cloud Magnific / Topaz / HitPaw (outside local SSOT)
